plan_kts:
fun plan(repoRoot: String, pullRequestNumber: Int): Verdict {
    val repoContextReadme = readFile(".repo_context/README.md")
    val repoContextIndex = readFile(".repo_context/index.md")
    val repoContextMaintenance = readFile(".repo_context/maintenance.md")
    val generatedRepoIndex = readFile(".repo_context/generated/repo_index.md")
    val engineeringPrinciples = readFile(".repo_context/modules/overview/engineering-principles.md")
    val changedFiles = githubListPullRequestFiles(owner = "SiRumCz", repo = "yuanrong-datasystem", pullRequestNumber = pullRequestNumber)
    val pullRequestDiff = githubReadPullRequestDiff(owner = "SiRumCz", repo = "yuanrong-datasystem", pullRequestNumber = pullRequestNumber)
    val touchedDomains = inferTouchedDomains(changedFiles, generatedRepoIndex)
    val relevantContextPaths = selectRepoContextForDomains(touchedDomains, repoContextIndex)
    val relevantContext = readFiles(relevantContextPaths)
    val sourceClaims = extractBehavioralAndOperationalClaims(pullRequestDiff)
    val documentationChanges = filterDocumentationChanges(changedFiles, pullRequestDiff)
    val docExpectations = deriveDocumentationExpectations(sourceClaims, engineeringPrinciples, relevantContext, repoContextMaintenance)
    val coherenceFindings = compareDocsToCodeChanges(documentationChanges, docExpectations, relevantContext)
    val staleContextFindings = detectStaleOrMissingRepoContextUpdates(changedFiles, sourceClaims, relevantContext, repoContextMaintenance)
    val verdict = judgeDocsUpdatedAppropriately(coherenceFindings, staleContextFindings)
    val evidence = buildVerdictEvidence(verdict, coherenceFindings, staleContextFindings)
    return makeVerdict(evidence)
}
